name_cn:
Genuine Leather
[Premium Hardware Genuine Leather]~Orange Imported Cowhide Charm
This charm can accessorize other items with a unique style. Embellished with a embossed logo, adding a signature element.
- Tie closure
- Zipper closure
- Embossed letter logo
- Lined
Size: w11×h7×d4cm
No.: 5NR036 _ 020 _ MM030
